summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School Management System - backend APIs 100% functional, frontend working with minor UI interaction issues in modals

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown selections in modals require force clicks due to overlay interception
ui_bugs.note: Common shadcn/ui modal overlay issue, doesn't prevent functionality

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with stat cards (Total Students, Present Today, Absent Today, Fees Collected)
Navigation sidebar has all required links (Dashboard, Classes, Students, Attendance, Fees, Expenses, Settings)
Classes page - add new class with sections (TestClass with sections A, B created successfully)
Classes page - verify classes list displays (class card shown with edit/delete buttons)
Students page - form loads with class/section dropdowns populated from created classes
Attendance page - Take Attendance tab with class/section dropdowns functional
Attendance page - View Attendance tab with filters working
Fees page - Collect Payment tab with student search functionality
Fees page - Fee Types tab with add fee type form
Fees page - Day Sheet tab with date selection and load functionality
Settings page - WhatsApp tab with API URL and access token fields
Settings page - Database tab showing current MongoDB URL (mongodb://localhost:27017) and database name (test_database)
All backend APIs working (26/26 tests passed): Dashboard stats, Classes CRUD, Fee Types CRUD, Students CRUD, Attendance operations, Fees operations, Settings operations
